headline: Sentiment down 56% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Optimism trending down 7% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 126 quotes and 101 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and irritation today.

• Despite the high volume, frustration scores dropped from yesterday and sit in the middle of the typical range for this period.

• Optimism hit a notable low with mostly mild sentiment, while fears stayed quiet with moderate engagement.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
